title: Unable to lower to FIRRTL from handshake using -lower-handshake-to-firrtl with internally defined memref
body:
I have the following sample code in standard:

func @test (%arg0: index) ->f32 {
%0 = alloc() : memref<10xf32>
%c0 = constant 0 : index
%c10 = constant 10.0 : f32
store %c10, %0[%c0] : memref<10xf32>
%5 = load %0[%c0] : memref<10xf32>
return %5 : f32
}

Which I can lower to Handshake dialect, obtaining:

module {
  handshake.func @test(%arg0: index, %arg1: none, ...) -> (f32, none) {
    %0:3 = "handshake.memory"(%9#0, %9#1, %addressResults) {id = 0 : i32, ld_count = 1 : i32, lsq = false, st_count = 1 : i32, type = memref<10xf32>} : (f32, index, index) -> (f32, none, none)
    %1:2 = "handshake.fork"(%0#1) {control = false} : (none) -> (none, none)
    %2 = "handshake.merge"(%arg0) : (index) -> index
    "handshake.sink"(%2) : (index) -> ()
    %3:3 = "handshake.fork"(%arg1) {control = true} : (none) -> (none, none, none)
    %4:3 = "handshake.fork"(%3#2) {control = true} : (none) -> (none, none, none)
    %5 = "handshake.join"(%4#2, %1#1, %0#2) {control = true} : (none, none, none) -> none
    %6 = "handshake.constant"(%4#1) {value = 0 : index} : (none) -> index
    %7:2 = "handshake.fork"(%6) {control = false} : (index) -> (index, index)
    %8 = "handshake.constant"(%4#0) {value = 1.000000e+01 : f32} : (none) -> f32
    %9:2 = "handshake.store"(%8, %7#0, %3#1) : (f32, index, none) -> (f32, index)
    %10 = "handshake.join"(%3#0, %1#0) {control = true} : (none, none) -> none
    %11, %addressResults = "handshake.load"(%7#1, %0#0, %10) : (index, f32, none) -> (f32, index)
    handshake.return %11, %5 : f32, none
  }
}

But when I try to lower that to FIRRTL from it, I get the following errors:

circt-opt: ../llvm/mlir/include/mlir/IR/Types.h:296: bool mlir::Type::isa() const [U = circt::firrtl::BundleType]: Assertion `impl && "isa<> used on a null type."' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://bugs.llvm.org/ and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0. Program arguments: circt-opt -lower-handshake-to-firrtl test_1_HS.mlir 
1. In-Flight Diagnostics:
    loc("test_1_HS.mlir":2:3): error: Unsupported data type. Supported data types: integer (signed, unsigned, signless), index, none.
    loc("test_1_HS.mlir":3:12): error: Unsupported data type. Supported data types: integer (signed, unsigned, signless), index, none.
    loc("test_1_HS.mlir":3:12): error: Unsupported data type. Supported data types: integer (signed, unsigned, signless), index, none.

Which points to the arguments of the test function and the arguments of the handshake memory element.
